name: Autolus Therapeutics plc
description: Autolus Therapeutics plc is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing next-generation, programmed T cell therapies for the treatment of cancer and autoimmune diseases. Using its proprietary T cell programming technologies, the company is designing a broad pipeline of product candidates, including its lead program, obecabtagene autoleucel (obe-cel), a CD19-targeting CAR T cell therapy. Autolus aims to provide cancer patients with more effective and safer treatment options by utilizing advanced cellular programming to overcome the limitations of current CAR T cell therapies.
